vars.SHIPPING_POLICY: # Shipping Policy  **Last Updated: June 2026**  Thank you for shopping at MarwanShop.com. We are committed to delivering your orders quickly and securely. Please review our shipping policy below.  ## Order Processing  * Orders are processed within **1–3 business days** after payment confirmation. * Orders are not processed, shipped, or delivered on weekends or public holidays. * During periods of high order volume, processing times may be slightly delayed.  ## Shipping Methods & Delivery Times  Estimated delivery times vary depending on your location and selected shipping method:  ### United States  * Standard Shipping: **3–7 business days** * Expedited Shipping: **2–4 business days**  ### International Orders  * Standard International Shipping: **7–21 business days** * Delivery times may vary depending on customs clearance and local postal services.  ## Shipping Rates  Shipping charges are calculated at checkout based on:  * Delivery destination * Package weight and dimensions * Selected shipping method  Any
vars.RETURN_POLICY: # Return & Refund Policy  **Last Updated: June 2026**  Thank you for shopping at MarwanShop.com. Customer satisfaction is important to us. If you are not completely satisfied with your purchase, please review our return and refund policy below.  ## Return Eligibility  We accept returns within **30 days** of the delivery date.  To be eligible for a return, the item must:  * Be unused and in the same condition that you received it. * Be in its original packaging. * Include all accessories, manuals, and original components. * Be accompanied by proof of purchase or order confirmation.  ## Non-Returnable Items  The following items cannot be returned:  * Gift cards * Downloadable software or digital products * Personalized or custom-made products * Clearance or final sale items * Products marked as non-returnable  ## Return Process  To initiate a return, please contact our customer support team at:  **Email:** [support@marwanshop.com](mailto:support@marwanshop.com)  Please include:  * Order number * Product name *
